---
title: Ros PS reports summary
subtitle: "`r paste0('Last updated: ', format(Sys.time(), format = '%d %B %Y - %H:%M'))`" #%F %r %Z
author: "Author: [IOTC Secretariat](mailto:IOTC-Secretariat@fao.org)"
output:
  html_document:
    mathjax: null
    css: "../templates/html_template.css"
---

```{r, setup, include=FALSE, echo = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE, message = FALSE)
```
```{r detail, child='all_report-abstract.Rmd'}
```

# Summary (global) {.tabset}
```{r}
summary_title$set_length(50)
check_data_summary <- gloabal_result
summary_title$set_suffix("-global")
```
```{r summary, child='report-PS-summary.Rmd'}
```

# Summary (per file) {.tabset}
```{r}
summary_title$set_length(20)
check_data_summary <- result
summary_title$set_suffix("-file")
```
```{r summary, child='report-PS-summary.Rmd'}
```

```{r detail, child='all_report-details.Rmd'}
```
